column5: golden-vector harness reconstructing a recorded pre-migration bit pattern for comparison; plus the superposition's i128 raw-bit accumulator, which sums contributions in i128 and range-checks once rather than letting a running Fixed sum overflow on a long load list
curvature bisection stepping raw Q32.32 values to adjacency, plus its monotonicity sweep
Fixed::from_bits(1).ln() = ln of the smallest positive Fixed, the log-space probability floor (ln_p_floor)
scaled-representation unit tests constructing a specific Q-format value from bits
saturating fixed-point add/subtract helpers rebuilding a Fixed from raw-bit saturating arithmetic (the ballistic integrator's determinism-safe ops), no authored value
saturating fixed-point add/subtract helpers rebuilding a Fixed from raw-bit saturating arithmetic (the atmosphere-coupled flight integrator's determinism-safe ops), no authored value
saturating fixed-point add/subtract helpers rebuilding a Fixed from raw-bit saturating arithmetic (the unified momentum integrator's determinism-safe ops), no authored value
saturating fixed-point add/subtract helpers rebuilding a Fixed from raw-bit saturating arithmetic (the runout integrator's determinism-safe ops), no authored value
the cited [M] Lodders 2003 Table 8 condensation temperatures parsed to Fixed through BigRat, reads the measured table never authors

the convection-scaling loader round-trips the cited Nusselt prefactor a, the bare coefficient C, and the BC-conditioned critical Rayleigh numbers from convection_scaling.toml to fixed-point, the same discipline as the hayashi-wall, ionic-radii, and mineral-moduli loaders; the values are the vendored cited-data column, never authored inline

register fundamentals e and N_A are parsed to BigRat for the Faraday eV conversion; the held tetrahedral-radius decimal text and its regression oracle use the same exact parser before one Q32.32 projection; these sites read the floor or cited table and author no world value

the CODATA fundamentals N_A and k_B are round-tripped from the fundamentals registry to derive the molar gas constant R = N_A*k_B for the Arrhenius denominator of the H&K creep rows, the identical derivation and identical registered inputs as melting.rs above (this crate keeps constants per-module; the two sites cannot disagree, and hoisting them to one crate-level constant is a cross-file change surfaced rather than reached for); no authored value, the numbers are the fundamentals read from the floor

the held Herschbach-Laurie Badger parameter decimal text and its regression oracle parse exactly through BigRat before one Q32.32 projection; these sites read the cited table and author no world value

the Gruneisen loader round-trips the cited per-phase gamma_thermodynamic, gamma_eos_debye, their bands, and the T,P chord from the gruneisen.toml data file to fixed-point, the same discipline as the mineral-moduli and convection-scaling loaders it was built to mirror; the values are the vendored cited-data column read with a source, never authored inline

the Hayashi-wall grid loader round-trips the cited BHAC15 wall T_eff and drift-band decimal strings from the hayashi_wall.toml data file to fixed-point, the same discipline as the ionic-radii, mineral-moduli, and lattice-modulus loaders; the values are the vendored cited-data column (BHAC15, source sha256 b95474c5), never authored inline
the cited [M] Murphy-Koop ice saturation pressures parsed to Fixed through BigRat, reads the equation values never authors
the cited [M] JANAF table values (Chase 1998) parsed to Fixed through BigRat, reads the measured table never authors

the Born-exponent, structure-prototype, and ionic-lattice-energy-validation loaders round-trip cited decimal strings (Born exponents, Madelung constants, Born-Haber reference energies) from their TOML data files to fixed-point, the same discipline as the periodic-table and phase-registry loaders

the CODATA fundamentals N_A and k_B are round-tripped from the fundamentals registry to derive the molar gas constant R = N_A*k_B, the same derivation as environ.rs derived_gas_constant (which projects the composite bits); no authored value, the numbers are the fundamentals read from the floor

the mineral-moduli loader round-trips cited single-crystal K, G, their bands, and the P,T chord from the mineral_moduli.toml data file to fixed-point, the same discipline as the phase-registry and lattice-modulus loaders; the values are measured floor data read with a source, never authored inline
the cited [M] opacity-table values read exactly through BigRat (parse_decimal_fixed), not authored
the cited [M] Robie-Hemingway perovskite Gibbs energies parsed to Fixed through BigRat, reads the compilation never authors

the phase-conductivity loader round-trips the cited kappa_298 anchors, their bands and relative uncertainties, and the measured principal conductivities, from the phase_conductivity.toml data file to fixed-point, the same discipline as the gruneisen, mineral-moduli and convection-scaling loaders it mirrors; the crystallographic counts beside them are integers parsed with str::parse and never touch this path, and every value is the vendored cited-data column read with a source, never authored inline

the critical-Rayleigh eigenvalue loader round-trips the cited marginal-stability eigenvalues and their critical wavenumbers from the rayleigh_critical_eigenvalues.toml data file to fixed-point, the same discipline as the convection-scaling, lattice-modulus, and mineral-moduli loaders; the values are cited floor data read with a source, never authored inline

register fundamentals e and k_B parsed to BigRat, plus the ln_of_decimal decimal parser (the scientific mantissa, the plain-fits value, and the wide-plain normalized mantissa branches); reads the floor / an input decimal, never authors
the cited [M] AGSS09 solar log-eps abundances parsed to Fixed through BigRat, reads the compilation never authors

the cited Domingos-Winter-Yokoyama (2006) Hill-fraction stability coefficients (0.4895, 0.9309, 1.0305, 0.2738, 1.0764, 0.9812) and the classical fluid Roche coefficient (2.44), PIPELINE_FETCHES.md sections 7-8, each carried as its published decimal string through the cited() reader and round-tripped to Fixed for the dormant moon-survival primitives; reads the cited literature never authors

5 in the derivation parse cited fundamental and unit anchors (EARTH_MASS_KG, SOLAR_MASS_KG, CODATA SPEED_OF_LIGHT, SECONDS_PER_JULIAN_YEAR, ASTRONOMICAL_UNIT_M) to BigRat for once-computed unit conversions (the Earth-to-Sun mass ratio and c in AU per year), reads the floor never authors; 22 in the test module are real solar-system planet parameters (Jupiter, Saturn, Mercury, Venus masses, semimajor axes, eccentricities) feeding the Laplace-Lagrange analytic-recovery and Mercury-GR validation tests, known reference values never derivation-path content

the cited [M] Murphy-Koop (2005) ice saturation equation coefficients (a,b,c,d), read from the physics ice_sublimation column via equation_coefficients(), parsed to Fixed to evaluate ln p_sat at an arbitrary disk temperature for the small-body snow-line split; reads the cited equation never authors
the cited reference anchors SOLAR_LUMINOSITY_W and SOLAR_RADIUS_M parsed to BigRat for the wide surface-flux path, reads the anchor never authors

the cited post-main-sequence stellar-track residents parsed to Fixed/BigRat: the Schonberg-Chandrasekhar coefficient (0.37), the shell-burning homology prefactor (238000), the CNO exponent (0.04) and the core-mass polynomial coefficients (0.0305, 0.1802) and fit-domain bounds (0.5, 0.66, 0.8) from the capstone resolution section 3, the hydrogen mass-defect fraction (0.00712) and the reference anchors SPEED_OF_LIGHT / SOLAR_LUMINOSITY_W / SOLAR_MASS_KG; reads the cited resolution and floor anchors never authors, per-world composition (mu, Z_CNO, X_env, core mass, Hayashi band) is a caller argument

the conservative deep-time bit-space redistributions in raw field bits, each a world-crate delta that sums to exactly zero (mass moved, never created or lost): the impact delta (excavated bowl balancing ejecta blanket) applied to the bombardment relief and the running surface, and the support-bound collapse delta (the redistribute chain) applied to the crust AREAL-MASS STOCK as it flows to the mechanical support bound, the thickness being re-read off the moved stock rather than moved beside it; the two impact legs are CHECKED adds validated against the delta's zero sum before any of the raster is committed, so a basin lands whole or not at all
the superposition's i128 raw-bit accumulator: contributions are summed in i128 and converted back once after a range check, so a long load list cannot overflow the running sum

two production sites derive branch and derivative-resolution floors from the Q32.32 representation ulp; the third occurrence is the explanatory formula in the adjacent rustdoc, not a value constructor
a representability-boundary test constructs three and four raw ulps and asserts the exact one-ulp limiting-reagent result
the conductivity test module parses cited validation-census and synthetic test decimals through one helper
the MGD test module parses sweep coordinates and comparison fixtures; no production value enters through these sites
